{{Quote|Well, I don't quite understand your purpose here in attacking our ships—but you certainly shouldn't hurt ''me''.|[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Supervisor/Legends|Supervisor]] [[Gurdun]] to IG-88|<ref name="Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88">{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref>}}
The '''Battle en route to the second Death Star''' ended shortly after it began. It began when the assassin droid, [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88A]], intercepted an Imperial [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], carrying the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star's]] Computer Core. After destroying the shuttle's escort, IG-88 boarded the vessel. Onboard, IG-88's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] battled real stormtroopers on the shuttle. IG-88A was surprised to find [[Supervisor/Legends|Supervisor]] [[Gurdun]] who had overseen Project Phlutdroid, was in the bridge. When Gurdun told him that he should be gracious toward him, for commissioning his construction, IG-88 thanked him, then planted several explosives on the vessel, as his stormtroopers carried the core out, and downloaded its contents onto their modified core. As IG-88's identical shuttle rode away, the real shuttle exploded.

==Appearances==
